name: Fresh Strawberry-Rhubarb Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 batch pie dough, enough for 9-inch double pie crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the rhubarb and remove any tough pieces. Chop into small pieces.
2. Slice the strawberries and add to the chopped rhubarb.
3. Mix the remaining ingredients (sugar, tapioca, salt, margarine) in a bowl and stir until combined.
4. Add the fruit mixture to the prepared pie crust, dot with margarine, and cover with the second crust.
5. Seal the edges of the crust.
6. Bake at 375°F for 50-55 minutes.
7. Tent the top crust with aluminum foil during the first 30 minutes of baking to prevent excessive browning.
8. Remove the foil during the last part of baking, about 10 minutes before the pie is done.
9. Optionally, brush warm milk over the top and sprinkle lightly with sugar for added sweetness.
